description: Three speakers go through multiple time proposals before reaching consensus on a single security audit review meeting.

events.title: Security Audit Review
events.reasoning: After negotiating through Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and an initial 2 PM Thursday proposal, all three speakers finally agree on Thursday at 3 PM for 2 hours. Alice will send the invite.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: security audit review on Thursday at 3 PM after extended negotiation.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Thursday=Feb 26. The earlier 2 PM Thursday proposal was superseded by the final 3 PM agreement.
